ReportsService getRevenueSummary() calculates totalCollected as sum of paidAmount
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() calculates totalOutstanding as sum of dueAmount
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() returns billCount equal to number of bills found
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() returns zeros when no bills exist
